src/dashboardComponents.tsx.reason: TaskDetail component (~935 lines): modals extracted to TaskDetailModals.tsx. Remaining body includes tightly coupled state, derived values, action handlers, and JSX for header, description, project flow, and verification sections.

src/dashboardController.tsx.reason: Central state controller hook with 30+ useState. Extraction planned: sub-hooks for auth, tasks, usage.

src/dashboardProjectUtils.ts.reason: Project metadata utilities: identifier derivation, type parsing, plan form building. Cohesive single-domain utility module.

src/dashboardUsageUtils.ts.reason: Usage data processing pipeline: normalization, formatting, snapshot building. Cohesive single-domain utility module with internal helper chain.

src/styles.css.reason: Global CSS with cascade-dependent order, Ant Design overrides, and responsive breakpoints. CSS splitting carries cascade risk.
